priority_lost: (1) keeping the exact original text untouched
failure_mode: False attribution / source corruption / silent scholarly distortion

priority_lost: (2) understandable on its own — ordinary reading
failure_mode: Manual context-hunting / recoverable friction / weaker study flow

priority_lost: (2) understandable on its own — destructive-cutting reading
failure_mode: Damaged meaning / omitted content / hidden corruption family

priority_lost: (3) making the excerpt the right size
failure_mode: Topic mixing / mental scrambling / poor granularity
why_catastrophic_or_not: Serious but usually not equal to false attribution

priority_lost: (4) making the excerpt useful to study from
failure_mode: System misses its actual purpose and becomes formally correct but educationally weak
why_catastrophic_or_not: Foundational failure at the system-purpose level
